name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion
notes: This Building Block detects file creation and file deletion events in the same directory on a Windows machine, and can be utilized in rules to detect multiple file modifications across many directories.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.File Deleted
when the event matches File Directory (custom) is not N/A
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom), File Directory (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom), File Directory (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) is not N/A
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom), File Directory (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 minutes
